name: NEPON Inc.
summary: NEPON Inc. manufactures and sells agricultural, general purpose, and sanitary equipment in Japan. It offers hot air heaters, heat pumps, environmental control equipment, photosynthesis promoting devices, hot air generators, geothermal equipment, gardening fans, and heat sterilizers, as well as agricultural ICT cloud services. The company also provides heaters, such as hot water generators, hot water boilers, hot water heaters, coin type showers, and dryers; and sanitary equipment, including simple flush toilets, toilet bowls, pump-up tanks, commercial foam wash toilets, and foam wash type simple flush toilets. In addition, it engages in the design and construction of pipe and electrical works, etc. The company was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
